steps.title: Use the contrast clue
steps.content: The basking shark had been classified as a full ectotherm, but its body temperature remains above the surrounding water. Since full ectotherms match ambient temperature, the finding conflicts with that classification.

steps.title: Reject hierarchy and support meanings
steps.content: Choice B suggests a rank relationship, not a conflict. Choice C suggests the finding is advantageous for the classification. Choice D would mean the elevated temperature points to the full-ectotherm classification, but it points away from it. The phrase meaning incompatible with fits. The answer is A.
